title: Agreement with National Gas Secures Long-Term Collaboration on Clean Energy
content:
Gas Networks Ireland (GNI) is proud to announce a new partnership with National Gas, marking another important step in our mission to accelerate the energy transition. 

The new Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) was signed in National Gasâ€™ London office by Ian Radley, Chief Commercial Officer at National Gas and David Kelly, Director of Customer and Business Development at Gas Networks Ireland. It sets the foundation for closer collaboration on hydrogen and biomethane gases, and blends of these gases in the natural gas system. 

The MoU will enable us to share information and outcomes from our respective operational improvement activities, and to explore mutually beneficial projects.
author: Analysts Account
